name: Code Snippet Manager
description: A premium developer tool to save, organize, and instantly reuse code snippets. Tag-based, searchable, and blazing fast.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-src 'none'; connect-src 'none';
